results.title: Costco has found an AI use members will appreciate
results.description: Costco, like many of its retail rivals, has embraced artificial intelligence (AI). That's perhaps a little surprising given that the chain has traditionally waited for its rivals to prove the benefits of using emerging technology before adopting it. AI, while it has become common, has also had its ...

results.title: Rotten Tomatoes Says This Low-Budget Dino Movie Is Better Than Most Jurassic Park Films
results.description: Do you think that no dinosaur movie can top the Jurassic franchise? This overlooked 2025 sci-fi horror film outscored most of the franchise with critics.
